overall.description: A cinematic Unreal Engine 5 scene depicting a hooded character in a white cloak standing on a sandy beach, facing a coastal medieval settlement with a stone bell tower and dramatic rocky cliffs. The scene features dynamic cloud coverage, gentle ocean waves, and warm afternoon lighting with birds flying overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with medieval stone tower and natural rock formations

agents.ego_description: standing still on the sandy shore, facing the coastal settlement and stone tower while the wind gently moves the cloak

entered.detail: tall stone bell tower with golden spire and arched windows, situated on the coastline
large rocky cliff formation with a natural archway tunnel, covered in green moss
weathered wooden pier extending along the shoreline with vertical posts
calm ocean water with gentle waves lapping against the shore
wet sand with tidal pools and seaweed scattered across the foreground
rocky sea stacks and cliffs visible on the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a windswept beach facing a picturesque coastal settlement. A medieval stone tower with a golden spire dominates the mid-ground, while a dramatic natural rock arch frames the right side of the view. The calm ocean stretches to the left with distant sea stacks visible on the horizon, and a weathered wooden dock lines the right shore beneath the cliffs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a windswept beach that reveals the expansive scale of a picturesque coastal settlement. It begins with a focused view of a hooded character in a white cloak standing on the sand, facing a medieval stone tower with a golden spire. As the camera glides forward, the perspective expands to encompass a dramatic natural rock arch framing the right side of the vista. The scene then opens further to reveal a weathered wooden dock lining the shore beneath towering cliffs, while the calm ocean stretches toward distant sea stacks on the horizon.
